name: Apple Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Corn Syrup, light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crusts for a filled two-crust pie using a 9-inch pan. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, stir together sugar, corn starch, and cinnamon until well mixed.
3. In another large bowl, mix apples, cranberries, and corn syrup.
4. Add the fruit mixture to the sugar mixture. Mix to combine.
5. Spoon into pie crust-lined pan. Dot with butter.
6. Top with second crust; flute edges.
7. Cut four 4-inch slashes in the center of the crust, forming a criss-cross design.
8. Gently press the center points inward to form 8 petals.
9. Brush the crust with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
10. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Cool completely on a wire rack. Store in the refrigerator.
